title: oCode-AnarchiaBosses
description: Create custom bosses with skills, attributes, equipment and more!
body:
# 🔥 oCode-AnarchiaBosses

**oCode-AnarchiaBosses** is a powerful and flexible Minecraft plugin that lets you create fully customizable bosses and mobs with unique behaviors, skills, gear, and more!

## ✨ Key Features:
- ### 🗺️ **In-Game Configuration**
  Everything is managed via clean in-game control panel!
- ### 🧟 **Custom Mobs**
  Create your own mobs with custom equipment and behaviors.  
- ### 🛡️ **Custom Equipment**
  Assign unique armor, weapons, and items.  
- ### ⚡ **Potion Effects & Attributes**
  Modify health, damage, speed, add invisibility, strength, and more.  
- ### 🎯 **Special Abilities**
  Create passive and active skills with visual effects and actions.  
- ### 🐴 **Passengers Support**
  Stack mobs with riders (e.g., skeleton riding a spider).  
- ### 📊 **BossBar Support**
  Display a health bar while the boss is alive.  
- ### 🏆 **Damage Leaderboard**
  Real-time scoreboard of top damagers during the fight.  
- ### 🎁 **Custom Rewards**
  Give unique rewards based on leaderboard rankings.  
- ### ⏳ **Post-Boss Scoreboard**
  Show a summary scoreboard for a limited time after boss death.  

## 🔧 Commands:
### 🙍‍♂️ Player Commands:
- `/drop` – View the potential loot for each boss.
### 🫅 Admin Commands:
- `/ocodeanarchiabosses panel` – Opens the control panel.  
- `/ocodeanarchiabosses spawn <boss>` – Spawns a selected boss.  
- `/ocodeanarchiabosses reload` – Reloads the configuration files.

## 🛡️ Permissions:
- `ocode-anarchiabosses.panel` – Access to admin panel.  
- `ocode-anarchiabosses.spawn` – Allows manual boss spawning.  
- `ocode-anarchiabosses.reload` – Reloads the plugin settings.

## 🧩 Placeholders (PlaceholderAPI):
- `%ocode-anarchiabosses_<boss>_respawn%` – Displays the respawn timer for a specific boss.

## ℹ️ Additional Info:
- 🎥 **Plugin Showcase**: [Click to watch](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YXj_p6uB_fo) 
- 🧷 **bStats**: [Click to view](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/oCode-AnarchiaBosses/25311)
- 🗒️ **Supported Versions**: **1.18.2 – 1.21.5**  
- 🔌 **Required Plugins**: `Tab`, `PlaceholderAPI`
